string 2:
I became addicted to delicious food and found myself
visiting sweets shops.

When my mouth is full of sweetness, things melt away and I
forget what needs to be done.
And now I finally remember what I was supposed to do.
{next}Sweets make people happy.
{next}What were you supposed to do?
{next}What sweets do you recommend?

I never knew that food could make one happy until I came
across sweets.

And sometimes salty snacks in between. Back and forth
between sweet and salty is great!

Repairing my armor. I cannot give it my all if my equipment
is damaged.

I cannot believe I forgot something so important. Sweets can
be dangerous things...

Check out the food section of department stores. You will
find the best shops there.

Of particular note are the limited-time shops. Check
department store schedules!

Now, about the armor... I will need Chrondigizoit Metal to
repair it.
I thought I could find some in the Factorial Area, but...
I heard the details from Magnamon.

Chrondigizoit Metal can indeed be smelted here. There's another
problem, though.

There's a shortage of Chrondigizoit ore, which is used to
make Chrondigizoit Metal.

As such, we have to get the necessary materials if we're
going to proceed.

The LoaderLeomon site you visited before hasn't secured
sufficient quantities yet.

I can show you another mine, so please bring us some 
Chrondigizoit ore from there.

I would like to deal with this problem by myself, but I need
to ensure I am successful.

I must ask you to accompany me to the site. What do you say?
Will you help me?
{next}Sure. Let's go.
{next}You really can't go on your own?
{next}I'll go when I can.
Thank you. I am sure that, together, we will be successful.

Chrondigizoit ore is extremely valuable. I feel like we
must be prepared for anything.

Will you really? I am counting on you! Do you hear me? I
will hold you to your word!

I shall go check out the site and meet you there once you
are ready.
See you there!

The mining site I mentioned is a dangerous place, subject to
many recent thefts.

Make sure you prepare accordingly before you leave. Good
luck to you.

Ah, there you are! I have been waiting for
you.
Look at this! It is some actual Chrondigizoit ore!

Yes, you do not have to remind me. I shall only take the
amount that is necessary.

This should be sufficient. Let us return to Guardromon and
begin the smelting process.

Hm...? Can you feel that? I am sensing an ominous presence
nearby.
Look out! Something is coming!
Hey! You stole that Chrondigizoit ore!

But I received permission! Besides, I only took the absolute
minimum amount necessary!

I don't care about any of that. All of this Chrondigizoit
ore belongs to me!
You're not allowed to take a single piece!

Wait a minute! Ugh... It is not listening to
me.
{next}Leave this to me.
{next}You can't fight with your armor like that.
{next}You head on back. I'll be right behind you.

You know I cannot do that! I shall not leave you here to
face this foe alone!

Perhaps not, but it does not appear that we can avoid this
battle in any case!

No, I refuse to let you do that! I get the feeling it shall
not end well for you!

...You want me to take the Chrondigizoit ore and go repair
my armor?

I suppose you are right... I am not at full strength yet. I
might only slow you down.

Very well. I leave it to you, then! I shall return as soon
as possible, so hang in there!
Ya wanna face me alone? You'll pay for your foolishness.
{next}Can't we talk for a minute?
{next}Why do you want the Chrondigizoit ore?
{next}I'm a big fan of yours!

You're blatantly stalling for time. Hmph. I'll entertain
your desperate plea, but...

It's not a matter of wanting it, you see. It's already mine
to begin with!

Oh? Did you attend my last meet-and-greet? I like to take
care of my fans, but...
That's enough of your stalling! Get ready to fight!
I am sorry for the delay!

My armor has been repaired perfectly! Let us now fight
together!
Urk... This can't be the end... Not yet...

It looks like we drove it off. You are quite formidable. I
am amazed you held out!

I asked the Factorial Area to hurry, but I feel you could
have won this battle alone.

This is for all of your help. Please take it, along with my
sincere gratitude.

My armor is now repaired, so I can finally head to the
rendezvous point.
I hope to see you again soon!
